item.title: ‘I’m no Jho Low 2’: Rafizi’s ex-aide denies misappropriation claims, slams MACC’s public search

item.title: Hindu endowments boards must be set up at state level, says ministry
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Deputy national unity minister R Yuneswaran says religious affairs fall under state jurisdiction, citing the Federal Constitution.
Matched: policy(+3), law(+3), parliament(+2), ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Govt to retable bill to cap PM’s term in June
item.description:

item.title: Sabah MPs back legal action if 40% revenue talks not settled by April 15
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today

item.title: MMA slams under-the-counter sale of diabetes meds for weight loss
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The association warns doctors against leasing their credentials to aesthetic operators that supply prescription diabetes drugs without proper medical checks.
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), breach(+3), diabetes(+2)

item.title: ‘Topple govt’ claim the mother of all lies, says Naimah’s lawyer
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Nizamuddin Hamid confirms being mentioned in a police report alleging the plot's existence but denies any discussion of such moves.

item.title: Rafizi’s ex-aide hits out at MACC for public search notice
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today

item.title: Rosmah seeks review of Federal Court ruling, says lawyer
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today

item.title: MACC probing Sunway’s proposed takeover of IJM

item.title: Pastor Koh’s family seeks to challenge govt appeal against discovery order

item.title: Court upholds 40-year jail term for man who killed mother
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The Federal Court says it was a heinous and morally reprehensible crime committed by the son, worsened by concealing the body in a septic tank.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Naimah gets leave to refer 2 constitutional questions to apex court

item.title: Opposition MPs thought PM term limit bill was to give Anwar 10 years in office - Fahmi

Minister claims this was why some PN lawmakers didn't back it.

item.title: Johor court hands down 21 years’ jail, 24 strokes for security guard who raped daughter and recorded the abuse
